English: Total seconds a player was crowd-controlled.
Filipino: Kabuuang segundo na ang isang player ay nasa crowd control.

English: Total seconds a player applied crowd-control effect on other players.
Filipino: Kabuuang segundo na ang isang player ay nakapaglagay ng crowd-control effect sa ibang players.

English: Total damage a player amplified through effects like Holycross, Swordcross, etc.
Filipino: Kabuuang pinsalang napalakas ng isang player sa pamamagitan ng mga effect tulad ng Holycross, Swordcross, at iba pa.

English: Total damage a player mitigated through effects like Damage Redirection, etc.
Filipino: Kabuuang pinsalang nabawasan ng isang player sa pamamagitan ng mga effect tulad ng Damage Redirection, at iba pa.
